title: gynostemma cissoides
intro: Gynostemma cissoides, also known as Jiaogulan or five-leaf ginseng, is a perennial vine native to Asia that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits associated with Gynostemma cissoides include reduced stress levels, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Gynostemma cissoides is commonly consumed as a tea or supplement, and its leaves can also be used to make infusions, tinctures, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
